summary: Verified bug fix for /print card art images. Hobby mode: 100/100 images loaded (complete=true, naturalWidth>0) across all pages including bottom pages. Pro mode: 101/101 images loaded (100 cards + 1 backside). Backside page (pro-page-back) renders with loaded image. Starter deck (Solar Singularity, 40 cards): 40/40 images loaded. Print/PDF and SVG(.zip) buttons present and clickable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: CardTemplate accepts an 'eager' prop that sets loading='eager' on the img; PrintPage passes eager to all print/pro cards. All card art (Cloudinary URLs) now loads immediately even on off-screen pages. Verified on Complete Set (100 cards, hobby+pro modes with backside page) and starter deck (40 cards).
rca of the issue: Root cause was loading='lazy' on card art ; off-screen sheet pages never fetched images and appeared blank in print preview. Fix (added eager prop, PrintPage passes it) is effective — all 100 hobby imgs, 101 pro imgs (incl. backside), and 40 starter imgs have complete=true and naturalWidth>0.
